item.text:
December – March
It is |cold in December*hot in December| and January. It is windy in February and March. It becomes |warmer in March*colder in March|. We can see the spring flowers in the parks.

April – June
It is |nice and sunny in April*chilly in April| and May. It is |hot in June*cold in June| and we start going to the beach and swimming in the sea. The water is warm.

July – August
It is still |hot and dry in July*wet in July|. The sun shines every day and the weather is dry and beautiful. We are still |on holiday in August*busy in August|. Many people come to the seaside.

September – November
It is still warm but the weather is changing. It often |rains in October*snows in October|. The leaves change colours and fall from the trees. |November is wet*It is dry in November|.
